label: wet-lab PHENOTYPIC serotype (GPS Poland cohort; Quellung/phenotypic; independent of genome)
source: Nat Commun 2025 GPS pipeline paper Supplementary Data 1 (Phenotypic_serotype) + ENA GPS-deposited assemblies
caller: dna_decode cps-reference blastn v0 (PneumoCaT Stage-1 DB, 95 serotypes)
honest_headline: serogroup ~0.94 is the v0's real independent resolution (single-best cps reference); exact ~0.66 is the within-serogroup-limited lower bound. Full GPS pipeline ~89% exact does allele-level within-serogroup typing (a v0.1). Label + assembly both independent of our caller (clears circularity).
